meaning: adj.抗焦虑的,防止(或消除)精神不安的
examples: Just as with antidepressant or antianxiety drugs, prescriptions can only work with other non-pharmacological approaches.
Since antianxiety medicine BuSpar went off-patent in April, for instance, sales of the drug have dropped 54%.
Identifying and challenging self-defeating thoughts, and gradually facing the source of fears, can provide more lasting relief than antianxiety medications, psychologists say.
